title.en: Ye Tian came to a piece of immortal blood gold ...

content.en:
Wow!

Ye Tian came to a piece of immortal blood gold and collected it.

Then, he picked up piece by piece, very carefully.

Fortunately, there is no danger here, as long as you can come in and not die, you can get these immortal blood gold.

"There must be an Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has been around here, it seems that they don't dare to come in, otherwise there wouldn't be so much immortal blood gold left here!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In short, his luck was too good.

Soon, he took away all the immortal blood gold here.

There are no other resources other than the Immortal Blood Gold.

It is estimated that the power of this rift is too terrifying, and even if other resources appear here, they will be erased.

After that, Ye Tian left here.

Next, he had to find the Primordial Flame of Heart.

The Heart Flame is an inextinguishable flame bred from the heart of the Origin Ancestor, and it has been burning there, even if the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm approaches, he will not dare to approach, otherwise once it is burned by the flames, he will be killed in an instant.

However, only the Flame of the Heart can forge the Arcana of Reincarnation.

Ye Tian didn't know the location of the Heart Flame Flame, but he could deduce it and determine the approximate location of the heart, and when the time came, there would be hope to find the Heart Flame Flame.

In order to find the Heart Flame as soon as possible, he directly copied the three copy bodies to estimate the location, during which it would definitely be very dangerous, and it was very likely to enter the place of death, but if he tried to copy the body, he would definitely find the Heart Flame in a short time.

Soon.

A replica body fell, and he sent another replica body.

And just like that, time passed.

Finally, not long after, Ye Tian came to the location of the Heart Flame Flame.

......

After endless years of evolution, the heart of the Origin Ancestor has turned into a vast world of flames, and the endless flame of the heart is burning.

When Ye Tian approached here, he felt the terrifying flame energy.

"This is the Flame of the Heart, you have to use it to forge the Reincarnation Treasure!"

Ye Tian came to a position close to the Heart Flame Flame, urging the body of Reincarnation Haotian all the time, so that he could avoid the flame energy that spread over from affecting the physical body.

Of course, he just approached, but he didn't dare touch the fire of the heart.

"Build a gun!"

Ye Tian thought.

He built it according to the gun he had refined before, and as long as it was made of indestructible blood gold, it was a treasure of reincarnation.

The only trouble is that during the refining process, don't be hurt by the fire of the heart.

Under normal circumstances, only those who are very powerful Origin Upper Realm Overlords would dare to refine the Reincarnation Treasure, and if their strength is weaker, it will be very dangerous.

And Ye Tian has only completed the first balance, comparable to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord who has awakened four times, this strength is not strong, it is still very dangerous.

Of course.

Ye Tian also had his own plan, he directly copied another replica body, if one of the replica bodies failed, the other replica body followed.

He didn't believe that he couldn't practice the reincarnation treasure this time.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian took out the Immortal Blood Gold and began to refine the Reincarnation Treasure.

And the first process is to melt the indestructible blood gold, and this process only needs to be persistent.

Rumble!!!!

Under Ye Tian's control, the Immortal Blood Gold came into contact with the Heart Flame and endured the burning of the Heart Flame Fire, and Ye Tian also tried his best to control this process.

He needs to control the indestructible blood, and there is a natural connection between them.

His power seemed to turn into countless lines that enveloped the immortal blood gold, but the fire of the heart flame would spread along the lines of power.

"Broken!"

Among them, the lines that were attracted by the burning of the Heart Flame were directly broken by Ye Tian and re-controlled.

In this way, time passed slowly, his power was seriously consumed, and the will of the Origin Realm was also rapidly consumed.

Suddenly.

The fire of the heart flame rioted, forming a wave of fire, which was unexpected and unpredictable.

And so, the danger came.

In an instant, countless Heart Flame flames burned all the lines of power, spreading at an incomparably terrifying speed.

At this time, Ye Tian had no way to dodge.

His entire body was directly wrapped in the flames of the heart, and his body was collapsing.

But.

His other replica body quickly took over and continued to refine the Reincarnation Arcana.

And just like that, time passed.

Ye Tian's replica body paid the price of his life and was used to refine the reincarnation treasure.

Of course, his other replicating bodies are also looking for resources that don't interfere with each other.

"Refining the Reincarnation Arcana is really difficult, and it shouldn't be able to be practiced in a short period of time, but before leaving, it can definitely be practiced, so let's refine these replica bodies. Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

The other side.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies came to a crack again, and he also approached the rift, but there was no indestructible blood gold here, but he found drops of brilliant golden blood, this blood was not simple at a glance, after all, even the crack couldn't erase it!

"Definitely a good thing!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

He sealed the drop of blood and put it away.

"After you go out, communicate with the other Origin Upper Realm Overlords, and you'll know what it is!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Afterwards.

He moved on again.

Abrupt.

He sensed the fluctuations of the battle.

There are no other creatures here, this must be two Origin Upper Realm Overlords fighting and fighting, presumably discovering something good.

"Let's take a look!"

Ye Tian flew over directly.

Soon.

He saw the two Origin Upper Realm Overlords in the battle.

"Desolate Blood Ancestor and Gu Jin Ancestor, it's the two of them!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

These two are not strong, they belong to the level of the weakest Origin Upper Realm Overlord, but they are all from overlord-level forces, and they have deep backgrounds, and other Origin Upper Realm Overlords do not dare to offend them.

"This Nine Tribulation Blood Vine is mine, Gu Jin Ancestor, you haven't hit the Origin Ancestor Awakening on the other side, and there is still a lot of hope for a breakthrough. And I'm different, I've impacted many times, and my physical body is seriously damaged, and this Nine Tribulation Blood Vine can heal my physical body, can be used to refine many kinds of secret medicines, and also helps me impact the first Origin Awakening on the other side. Such treasures are extremely rare, why do you want to fight with me!" the Desolate Blood Ancestor roared angrily.

"Desolate Blood Ancestor, if you need it, I don't need it? It's already difficult to break through, and I'm not sure about awakening, what if I fail? And with the Nine Tribulations Blood Vine, I also have a great hope of breaking through!"

Gu Jinzu said.
